name_cn:
NÉONOÉ Classic Series #M44020# Uninspected Version
▪️Dimensions: 26*26*17.5cm▪️
As a classic work, it is a rhythm where everyone has one
The wine bag designed in 1932 for carrying champagne meets contemporary trends,
Transforming into a bucket bag containing the beauty of heritage,
Also known as the 'King of Classics',
Regardless of era or age,
It has a different attraction, with a large capacity design,
This is a classic king that can accompany you through the prosperity of the world, and is also a bucket bag every woman must have!
